Name: Holovid Movie: The Attack Of The Polymer Coated Man
Details:
One of the biggest horror movies of the 31st century in the Draconis Combine, The Attack Of The Polymer Coated Man has released by Spreading the Glories Incorporated initially in Kurita space. Its popularity quickly made it be to distributed all over the Inner Sphere despite its blatant anti-Davion and xenophobic tones characteristic of Combine holovid propaganda.

Taking place in several systems close to Terra, the story concerns a Davion biological weapon that transforms MechWarriors into living cyborgs, who then escape the research lab and are only stopped by a lance of Kurita samurai MechWarriors.
